records.question: Which races took place on 1979-04-29 that were named Spanish Grand Prix and had a round number of at most 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
WHERE races.date = '1979-04-29' AND races.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND races.round <= 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE date = '1979-04-29' AND name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND round <= 5

records.question: Which races took place on 1984-06-03 at the Circuit de Monaco in Monaco, located at latitude 43.7347 and longitude 7.42056 with the URL http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Circuit_de_Monaco?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE circuits.name = 'Circuit de Monaco' AND circuits.country = 'Monaco' AND races.date = '1984-06-03' AND circuits.lng = 7.42056 AND circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Circuit_de_Monaco' AND circuits.lat = 43.7347
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE races.date = '1984-06-03'
  AND circuits.name = 'Circuit de Monaco'
  AND circuits.country = 'Monaco'
  AND circuits.lng = 7.42056
  AND circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Circuit_de_Monaco'
  AND circuits.lat = 43.7347

records.question: Which races named Brazilian Grand Prix took place on 1995-03-26 in round 1 or earlier where constructor results show exactly 0.0 points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN constructorresults ON races.raceid = constructorresults.raceid
WHERE races.date = '1995-03-26' AND races.round <= 1 AND constructorresults.points = 0.0 AND races.name = 'Brazilian Grand Prix'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN constructorResults ON races.raceId = constructorResults.raceId
WHERE races.date = '1995-03-26'
  AND races.round <= 1
  AND races.name = 'Brazilian Grand Prix'
  AND constructorResults.points = 0.0

WHERE races.date = '1999-03-07'

records.question: Which races took place at Autodromo Nazionale Monza on or before 1957-09-08?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Autodromo_Nazionale_Monza' AND races.date <= '1957-09-08'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE races.date <= '1957-09-08'
  AND circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Autodromo_Nazionale_Monza'

records.question: Which races have a time exactly equal to '07:00:00' and also have related records in both the seasons and constructorstandings tables?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN constructorstandings ON races.raceid = constructorstandings.raceid
WHERE races.time = '07:00:00'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN constructorStandings ON races.raceId = constructorStandings.raceId
WHERE races.time = '07:00:00'

records.question: Which races named United States Grand Prix that took place on 1959-12-12 and had rounds at most 9 featured drivers with exactly 0.0 points, no more than 0 wins, and positions of at least 34 with position text 34?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN driverstandings ON races.raceid = driverstandings.raceid
WHERE driverstandings.points = 0.0 AND driverstandings.wins <= 0 AND races.date = '1959-12-12' AND races.name = 'United States Grand Prix' AND driverstandings.position >= 34 AND driverstandings.positiontext = '34' AND races.round <= 9
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN driverStandings ON races.raceId = driverStandings.raceId
WHERE races.date = '1959-12-12'
  AND races.name = 'United States Grand Prix'
  AND races.round <= 9
  AND driverStandings.points = 0.0
  AND driverStandings.wins <= 0
  AND driverStandings.position >= 34
  AND driverStandings.positionText = '34'

records.question: Which races named "French Grand Prix" that have related seasons with the same year, circuits with circuitref equal to "magny_cours", and recorded laptimes are these?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN laptimes ON races.raceid = laptimes.raceid
WHERE races.name = 'French Grand Prix' AND circuits.circuitref = 'magny_cours'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes ON races.raceId = lapTimes.raceId
WHERE races.name = 'French Grand Prix'
  AND circuits.circuitRef = 'magny_cours'
GROUP BY races.raceId

records.question: What German Grand Prix races held at Hockenheim since 1994-07-31 have the circuit located at 49.3278 latitude with the URL http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hockenheimring and qualifying Q1 time exactly 1:47.102?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceid = qualifying.raceid
WHERE circuits.location = 'Hockenheim' AND races.date >= '1994-07-31' AND circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hockenheimring' AND circuits.lat = 49.3278 AND races.name = 'German Grand Prix' AND qualifying.q1 = '1:47.102'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceId = qualifying.raceId
WHERE races.date >= '1994-07-31'
  AND races.name = 'German Grand Prix'
  AND circuits.location = 'Hockenheim'
  AND circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hockenheimring'
  AND circuits.lat = 49.3278
  AND qualifying.q1 = '1:47.102'

records.question: What races named Chinese Grand Prix took place on 2005-10-16 at exactly 14:00:00 and had a round number of at most 19?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
WHERE races.round <= 19 AND races.time = '14:00:00' AND races.date = '2005-10-16' AND races.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix'

SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN seasons ON races.year = seasons.year
WHERE races.round <= 19
  AND races.time = '14:00:00'
  AND races.date = '2005-10-16'
  AND races.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix'
